updates.title: business-init + lumi-blueprint skills
updates.description: business-init scaffolds a full LUMI deployment from scratch — directory structure, manifest, SQLite DBs, Obsidian vault. lumi-blueprint automates PDF generation for the Blueprint series.

updates.title: Social layer unified — 4 legacy skills deprecated
updates.description: lumi-engage, lumi-x-engage, lumi-tiktok-engage, lumi-tiktok-outreach replaced by social-engage-inbound/outbound. Each deprecated skill redirects with migration notes.

updates.title: lumi-image-post + lumi-keyword-reply
updates.description: Image+text post creator for X using Nano Banana 2 → Cloudinary → OAuth 1.0a. Keyword-triggered auto-reply system reading from manifest engagement config.

updates.title: 4-post/day heartbeat — manifest v2.0.0
updates.description: Pipeline upgraded from 2 video posts to 4 daily: morning video (10:00 UTC), midday image, afternoon image, evening video. Two content pillars: whats_happening + behind_the_build.

updates.title: First LUMI Blueprint — Video Generation Pipeline
updates.description: 16-page technical guide covering voice formula assembly, sequential Kling segment submission, lossless FFmpeg merge, caption burning, and 8 production rules.

updates.title: YouTube banner + brand environment locked
updates.description: 2560×1440 banner using Exterior:Approach—Dusk as primary LUMI brand environment. 'Builds Itself' locked as canonical tagline. Deployed to YouTube.

updates.title: alice-cinematic-components + alice-design-system
updates.description: 31 animated HTML components auto-adapted to LUMI identity. 40+ brand DESIGN.md references mapped — LUMI design stack: ElevenLabs × Vercel × Stripe.

updates.title: No proper nouns in skill logic
updates.description: All agent IDs, DB paths, platform config now resolved from manifest at runtime. Skills are config-driven — deploy the same skill to any LUMI instance without edits.
